validation_evidence.evidence: Syntax check passed with no output.

validation_evidence.command: node --input-type=module -e "import { managedProjectConfig } from './test/helpers/control-plane-fixture.js'; import { normalizeConfig } from './src/config.js'; const normalized = normalizeConfig(managedProjectConfig(), { projectRoot: process.cwd() }); const task = normalized.tasks.dev; if (task.ports.length !== 1 || task.ports[0] !== 4173 || !task.command.includes(' 4173')) { throw new Error(JSON.stringify({ ports: task.ports, command: task.command })); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, port: task.ports[0], command: task.command }));"

node --input-type=module -e "import { managedProjectConfig } from './test/helpers/control-plane-fixture.js'; import { normalizeConfig } from './src/config.js'; const config = managedProjectConfig({ port: 53217 }); const normalized = normalizeConfig(config, { projectRoot: process.cwd() }); const task = normalized.tasks.dev; if (task.ports.length !== 1 || task.ports[0] !== 53217 || !task.command.endsWith(' 53217')) { throw new Error(JSON.stringify({ ports: task.ports, command: task.command })); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, port: task.ports[0], command: task.command }));"

node --input-type=module -e "import { writeManagedFixtureProject } from './test/helpers/control-plane-fixture.js'; import { normalizeConfig } from './src/config.js'; let capturedConfig; let capturedScript; const fixture = { writeConfig: (config) => { capturedConfig = config; }, writeScript: (scriptPath, content) => { capturedScript = { scriptPath, content }; }, path: (relativePath) => 'ABS/' + relativePath }; const result = writeManagedFixtureProject(fixture, { port: 53217 }); const normalized = normalizeConfig(capturedConfig, { projectRoot: process.cwd() }); const task = normalized.tasks.dev; if (result.port !== 53217 || result.command !== 'node scripts/dev-server.js 53217' || task.ports[0] !== 53217 || task.command !== result.command || capturedScript.scriptPath !== 'scripts/dev-server.js' || !capturedScript.content.includes('createServer')) { throw new Error(JSON.stringify({ result, task, capturedScriptPath: capturedScript?.scriptPath })); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, port: result.port, command: result.command, configPorts: task.ports, scriptPath: capturedScript.scriptPath }));"

failed_assumptions.assumption: A PowerShell one-liner could safely include a JavaScript template literal for the fake fixture path callback.
failed_assumptions.impact: The first extra write-path validation command failed before exercising project code because PowerShell consumed the backtick expression.
failed_assumptions.recovery: Reran the same validation using plain string concatenation; the recovered command passed.

consumer_evidence.default_behavior: managedProjectConfig() now normalizes successfully with declared port 4173 and command "node scripts/dev-server.js 4173".
consumer_evidence.override_behavior: Explicit port 53217 is preserved by managedProjectConfig() and writeManagedFixtureProject() in both ports and command.
consumer_evidence.script_fixture_behavior: writeManagedFixtureProject() still writes scripts/dev-server.js using fixtureServerScriptContent; no inline long-running node -e fixture was introduced.
